items.title: Polish-Based GRAI Secures €7.65M Seed Funding
items.body: GRAI, a Polish startup focused on AI-powered music remixing, has successfully secured €7.65 million in seed funding to enhance its platform. This funding marks a significant step in the growth of AI-driven solutions in the CEE region.

items.title: Polish Warsaw Equity Group Leads €5M Series A
items.body: The Polish Warsaw Equity Group has led a €5 million Series A investment alongside Porsche Ventures, marking a significant development in the EV charging sector within the CEE region.

items.title: Outcraft AI Raises €2 Million in Pre-Seed Funding
items.body: Vilnius-based Outcraft AI has raised €2 million in pre-seed funding to develop its autonomous revenue agents that enhance customer engagement across various platforms.

items.title: Slovenia's Strategic Approach to Startup Internationalisation
items.body: Slovenia is rethinking its approach to startup internationalisation by organizing national delegations to key events, enhancing visibility and access to international capital for local startups.

items.title: SPIRIT Slovenia's Delegation to ViennaUP 2026
items.body: SPIRIT Slovenia is leading a delegation of startups and investors to ViennaUP 2026, aiming to strengthen connections and opportunities for Slovenian startups in the international market.

items.title: National Center for Artificial Intelligence Opens in Czechia
items.body: The National Center for Artificial Intelligence has been inaugurated in Czechia, aiming to promote cutting-edge research and innovation in AI applications across various sectors.

items.title: CzechCrunch Future Event Highlights AI Innovations
items.body: The CzechCrunch Future event showcased various AI innovations and their impact on personal and professional lives, attracting over 900 attendees interested in the future of technology.
